## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes (type-check + build clean)
- [ ] `npm run stress` passes
- [ ] If I touched game balance/rules, `npm run simulate` still ends every game with one solvent winner and the stats look sane
- [ ] Screenshots/GIF attached for any visual change
- [ ] Everything added is original (no third-party brands/assets)
